message:
test(unit): add unit tests for parseStatValue and seededRandom

Add comprehensive unit tests for performance optimization work:

parseStatValue tests (30 tests):
- Simple integers, K/M/B suffixes, + suffix combinations
- Decimal numbers, comma-formatted numbers
- Non-animatable values (text, currency, percentage)
- Edge cases (large numbers, small decimals)

seededRandom tests (15 tests):
- Determinism verification (same seed = same sequence)
- Uniqueness verification (different seeds = different sequences)
- Output range validation [0, 1)
- Distribution quality checks
- Sequence properties (no immediate repeats, no quick cycles)
- Edge case seeds (0, negative, large, fractional, Infinity)
- Star field generation use case simulation

Also exports parseStatValue from stats-grid.tsx for testability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
